full_text:
Gu Yong (Yuantan) 顧雍 (元嘆)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gu Yong (顧雍), styledYuantan (元嘆), was born in Wu county in Wu prefecture. Studied under Cai Yong. Convinced to join Wu by Zhang Hong. Became Prime Minister. Gu Yong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Gu Yong lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
